title: Calculation Audit Trail and Traceability
description: Every RWA calculation must generate a complete audit trail including inputs, parameters, intermediate results, and final outputs with timestamps and user context.

regulatory_basis.rationale: Calculation traceability is required for audit and regulatory review
Accuracy requires ability to trace and verify calculations

required_evidence.description: Complete audit trail for all calculations
Detailed calculation traces for sample exposures

acceptance_criteria.description: Audit trail includes all required fields
Audit logs are immutable and tamper-evident

test_obligations.description: Verify audit trail generation for all calculation paths

implementation_hints.description: Use structured logging with correlation IDs for traceability
Consider using append-only log storage for immutability

anti_patterns.description: Logging only final results without intermediate steps
anti_patterns.risk: Cannot trace calculation errors or verify correctness
